title: Water World
description: A data pack version of the classic Survival Island adventure map genre.
body:
## __SUMMARY__ **A data pack version of the classic Survival Island adventure map genre.** You spawn on a small bamboo jungle island in a world of only oceans. Rather than a small custom-made area that you cannot exit, this pack changes world generation to only include ocean and cave biomes. The Nether also recieves a similar treatment, consisting of lava ocean and small islands. Some otherwise unobtainable items can be found around the world. ## __CHANGES__ * World Generation is limited to Ocean and Cave biomes, besides a Bamboo Jungle island at spawn * The Nether generates as an infinite lava ocean with small islands throughout * Saplings are distributed as loot across many structures * Otherwise unobtainable items can be found in chests, suspicious blocks, and trial vaults * Sniffers dig up flowers that are unobtainable in an Ocean world * Wandering Traders sell various animals * Husks spawn in Warm Oceans and drop Sand (or Red Sand when killed by fire) * Trail Ruins generate in Deep Oceans and Deep Cold Oceans * Sugar Cane and other plant blocks can be fished as junk * Buried Treasure does not generate * Removed Herobrine ### __World Generation__ * Only the following biomes can generate: * Deep Frozen Ocean * Frozen Ocean * Deep Cold Ocean * Cold Ocean * Deep Ocean * Ocean * Deep Lukewarm Ocean * Lukewarm Ocean * Warm Ocean * Lush Cave * Dripstone Cave * No longer needs tall land biomes above to generate * Deep Dark

* A single Bamboo Jungle island is at the World Spawn. This is the only generated island of its kind on the map. * Nether terrain generation is limited to small islands on an infinite lava ocean. Structures spawn as normal. * Trail Ruins can be found in Deep Oceans and Deep Cold Oceans poking out of the sea floor. * Buried Treasure does not spawn. As such, Buried Treasure Maps can not be found in Shipwrecks or Ocean Ruins. * Minimum distance between Ocean Monuments is increased. ### __Loot__ * Wandering Traders are completely overhauled. They now sell 'animal vouchers'. When purchased, the associated animal will pop out of the ground. - __Common (3 per trader)__ * Chicken * Cow * Pig * Sheep - __Uncommon (2 per trader)__ * Armadillo * Donkey * Goat * Horse * Rabbit - __Rare (2 per trader)__ * Allay * Camel * Fox * Mooshroom * Wolf * Saplings can be found as loot in a variety of structures: - __Common__ * Oak - Mineshaft & Dungeon Chests * Birch - Mineshaft & Dungeon Chests * Spruce - Mineshaft & Dungeon Chests - __Uncommon__ * Jungle - Warm Ocean Ruins (Suspicious Sand) * Acacia - Warm Ocean Ruins (Suspicious Sand) * Dark Oak - Cold Ocean Ruins (Suspicious Gravel) - __Rare__ * Pale Oak - Trial Chamber Vaults * Mangrove - Stronghold Chests * Cherry - Ancient City Chests

* More plant blocks, including Sugar Cane, Firefly Bushes, and Dry Grass can be fished as junk. * Nautilus Armor is found in Dungeon chests rather than Horse Armor. * Other unobtainable items such as Pottery Sherds, Goat Horns, and Hearts of the Sea are found in a variety of structures. The full list of loot table modifications can be found at the bottom of this page. ### __Sniffers__ * Sniffers dig up the following flowers, which otherwise cannot be found in the world: * Allium * Blue Orchid * Lily of the Valley * Orange Tulip * Pink Tulip * Red Tulip * White Tulip * Lilac * Peony * Rose Bush * Sunflower * *(Note: Poppies, Dandelions, Cornflowers, Oxeye Daisies, and Azure Bluet are not included as they can be grown in Dripstone Caves and Deep Dark biomes)* ### __Frogs & Turtles__ * While Frogs and Turtles do not spawn naturally, Turtle Eggs and Frogspawn can be found in the world: * Turtle Eggs - Warm Ocean Ruins (Suspicious Sand) * Frogspawn - Cold Ocean Ruins (Suspicious Gravel) ### __More Underwater Music__ * A separate resource pack that adds remixes of Minecraft's soundtrack that only play underwater. * Download at [More Underwater Music](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/more-underwater-music).
LOOT TABLES ## LOOT TABLE CHANGES ### Fishing - Added: * Sugar Cane * Short Dry Grass * Fern * Firefly Bush * Wildflowers * Pink Petals * *(Note: These items are fished when the player rolls a “junk” pull)* ### Shipwrecks - Removed: * Buried Treasure Map - Added: * Lily Pad * Dead Bush * Cactus * Arms Up Pottery Sherd ### Ocean Monuments - Added: * Heart of the Sea (Elder Guardian) ### Warm Ocean Ruins - Removed: * Buried Treasure Map (Chest) - Added: * Turtle Egg (Sand) * Acacia Sapling (Sand) * Jungle Sapling (Sand) * Cocoa Beans (Sand) ### Cold Ocean Ruins - Removed: * Buried Treasure Map (Chest) - Added: * Frog Spawn (Gravel) * Dark Oak Sapling (Gravel) ### Trail Ruins - Added: * Sweet Berries * Bush ### Mineshaft - Added: * Spruce Sapling * Birch Sapling * Oak Sapling * Miner Pottery Sherd * Prize Pottery Sherd ### Dungeon (Monster Room) - Removed: * All Horse Armor - Added: * Spruce Sapling * Birch Sapling * Oak Sapling * Heart of the Sea * Regular Goat Horn * Skull Pottery Sherd * All Nautilus Armor (excluding Netherite) ### Ruined Portal - Added: * Golden Nautilus Armor ### Trial Chamber - Added: * Archer Pottery Sherd (Chests) * Pale Moss (Chests) * Hanging Moss (Chests) * Closed Eye Blossom (Decorated Pots) ### Trial Vault - Added: * Pale Oak Sapling (3 to 6) * Screaming Goat Horns ### Ominous Vault - Added: * Creaking Heart ### Stronghold - Added: * Mangrove Propagule * Heart of the Sea * Brewer Pottery Sherd ### Ancient City - Added: * Cherry Sapling
HOW TO INSTALL 1. Download 'Water World Pack v1.1.zip' 2. Extract the file 3. In Minecraft, click 'Create New World' 4. Under 'More', click 'Data Packs' 5. Click 'Open Pack Folder' 6. Move 'Water World Pack v1.1' to that folder 7. Back in Minecraft, click the arrow symbol over the pack icon to select it 8. Click 'Done' 9. If Minecraft warns you that you are using Experimental Features, click 'Proceed' 10. You can now configure your world settings 11. When you're ready, click 'Create New World' 12. Your spawn island may generate in an odd location. If that is the case, you may want to try again and create a new world with the data pack.
